Try Free
Our story

We make every pixel count

PixelLift started with a simple frustration: the photos that matter most — old memories, early work, quick phone shots — are often the lowest quality. We built a tool to fix that, right in your browser.

Our mission

Give everyone — not just studios with expensive software — the power to turn low-resolution images into crisp, usable, high-resolution work. Free to start, private by design.

Our vision

A world where no great photo is discarded for being "too small." Where creators rescue instead of redo, and where image quality is never a barrier to a good idea.

Values

What we stand for

The principles that guide every decision we make.

Privacy first

Your images are processed in your browser. We never see, store, or sell your data.

Speed matters

Seconds, not minutes. We obsess over performance so you can move fast.

Quality obsessed

We benchmark every change against real photos. If it looks worse, we ship it never.

For everyone

From hobbyists to enterprises, PixelLift is built to be useful at every scale.

Journey

How we got here

01

2023

PixelLift started as a weekend project to rescue old phone photos.

02

2024

Launched the in-browser engine — no uploads, no servers, no waiting.

03

2025

Crossed 2 million images upscaled by creators worldwide.

04

2026

Introduced 4x detail reconstruction and batch processing.

Team

The people behind PixelLift

A small, remote team obsessed with image quality.
